# General Instructions
- Before running a command make sure to set current working directory to the project root.
- README.md is a good reference for understanding the project and its features. You can also refer to the [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) for a detailed roadmap with phases, dependencies, and testing tasks.
